title: GTA Online
headline: GTA Online
subtitle: Outfit the Pfister X-Treme in the New Premier Half Camo Livery
content: They say you can’t improve on perfection, but people say a lot of things that aren’t true. Gild the lily by wrapping the Pfister X-Treme (Super) in the new Premier Half Camo Livery, available from all Vehicle Workshops.
